plugins.name: napkin
plugins.description: End-to-end spec pipeline: turn a raw idea into a validated, build-seeded brief, judge it into a buildable-scope verdict (tier, feasibility, validated integrations), then collect a SaaS app's context (product, personas, glossary, capability map, RBAC, NFRs) into a flat spec/ workspace, author framework-agnostic Gherkin/BDD specs from it, and design + live-test a normalized DBML data model — one aligned, drift-free flow from idea to features to schema.

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Turn a finished napkin spec into an opinionated build blueprint and hand off to the build loop. Reads the spec/ workspace, verifies the latest (May 2026) best-practice stack (Bun + Turborepo + TypeScript, Drizzle with a PGlite⇄Postgres-16 env switch, shared Zod contracts, a single use-case layer behind Hono API + MCP, Better Auth multi-tenancy/RBAC, Vercel AI SDK 5 with LLM fixtures, latest React + Tailwind/shadcn driven by impeccable, one mock⇄real ports abstraction, Pulumi/Cloud Run), then writes spec/architecture.md — stack, monorepo layout, a data-first build sequence with backend-complete + landing-page-first + stop-to-validate checkpoints, and a continuous spec-drift protocol — and hands off to superpowers:writing-plans → subagent-driven-development. Blueprint + handoff only: it never runs scaffolding commands.
